name: copilot-chat-saver
description: Automatically saves all GitHub Copilot chat sessions (including Claude thinking/reasoning) as Markdown files in your workspace. 100% local, no telemetry, no network.

commands.title: Copilot Chat Saver: Save All Chats Now
Copilot Chat Saver: Open History Folder

copilotChatSaver.autoSave.description: Automatically save chat sessions when changes are detected.

copilotChatSaver.outputDirectory.description: Directory (relative to workspace root) where chat sessions are saved.

copilotChatSaver.pollIntervalSeconds.description: How often to check for new/updated chat sessions (seconds).

copilotChatSaver.includeThinking.description: Include Claude thinking/reasoning blocks in saved chats.

copilotChatSaver.includeToolCalls.description: Include tool call details (file reads, searches, edits) in saved chats.
